title: Detail Armor Bar Re-equipment
description: The detail armor bar adds more information to the armor bar.
body:
# Introduction
The 1.20.1 replica of the Detailed Armor Bar.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72ba36c8dcd918862128092104f0923f24667c63.png)
Added Armor Type Bar! +Elytra
## Features:
- Netherite Armor Bar
- Enchant Protection Type Color Effect
- Armor Mending Effect
- Thorns Overlay
- Armor's Low Durability Warn Effect
- Armor trim (new!)
- Elytra color & trim* (new!)
- And more!
*require Elytra Trims
## Protection Colors : 
- Protection - Aqua(Cyan)
- Projectile Protection - Purple
- Blast Protection - Yellow
- Fire Protection - Red or.. Orange?
